历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14036 → 14853 → 13565 → 13728 → 14688, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 650 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 14688; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 6 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 11 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 19, an expansion of about 73% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking 2026 approximately 58th, with recent rankings stable in the 47–61 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (vice dean dismissed for extramarital affairs during marriage, mistaken display of the Rising Sun flag), which may have a certain negative impact on some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 69th (average), with moderate exposure; Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, strongly attracting candidates aspiring to the education industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Related teacher-training/education majors have divergent social popularity; engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Energy and Power Engineering are relatively hot; the total number of candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is approximately 393,700, with an estimated 251,500 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 63.9%, a slight increase from 249,802 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 426 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strongest influencing factor of a significant 73% expansion in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, the ranking number should increase significantly (easier admission), but the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei Province and the negative reputation incidents may suppress some application enthusiasm, partially offsetting the expansion effect; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 20947, with a range of 20447–21447.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chemistry (Chemistry (Teacher Training, Non-Teacher Training), Applied Chemistry)
- Energy and Power (Energy and Power Engineering, Energy and Environmental Systems Engineering, Energy Service Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science)
- Synthetic Biology
- Administrative Management (Physics Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category sees a significant expansion, with the ranking range notably shifting backward compared to the 2025 baseline. It is recommended that candidates with rankings between 20000–21500 focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety net; candidates with rankings better than 20000 can prioritize sprinting for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Artificial Intelligence.
